markdownRemark.html:
Components

  • Tools I Use
  • Routines

Super Big Goals

  • Achieve financial freedom by 40 years old
  • Earn $5000/month in passive income by 30 years old
  • Memorize entire New Testament and Psalms
  • Learn every hymn in the hymn book
  • Achieve Tesla levels of imagery

Ideal Life

Day

Week

  • Go to homes as often as possible
  • Spent time with and care for the people you are burdened for

Year

  • Go to all the Seven Feasts
  • Have at least one month of a "mini-retirement"
  • Bring at least one person to the Lord and recover at least one backsliding saint and strength at least one young person

Life

  • Raise up all my children to love the Lord and be built into the church life
  • Give my future wife and children my best and be the best husband and father
